results.title: Consolidated Capital Management LLC Has $6.68 Million Holdings in Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
results.description: Consolidated Capital Management LLC lessened its position in Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST – Free Report) by 17.0% in the fourth quarter, HoldingsChannel reports. The fund owned 7,750 shares of the retailer’s stock after selling 1,584 shares during the quarter. Costco Wholesale makes up approximately 2.0% of Consolidated Capital Management LLC’s holdings, making the stock its [...]

results.title: Pakistan eye series victory in second ODI against Australia in Lahore
results.description: Pakistan and Australia are set to meet in the second match of their One Day International series on 2 June at Lahore’s Gaddafi Stadium, with the hosts carrying a 1–0 lead into the contest.
